howItWorks.intro: This dps calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How is DPS calculated?
faq.answer: Base DPS = Damage × Attack Speed. With crits: Effective DPS = Base DPS × (1 + Crit Chance × (Crit Multiplier - 1)). This gives average damage over time including critical hits.

howWeCalculate.intro: This dps calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs

Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
